race.comment: ROCK THE BAR (1) showed good talent early in his career and lost his way a bit before showing something last start, which preceded an appearance on Inglis Digital. The horse that beat him last start has since run well again and with the drop in grade he can run a race, despite the wide gate and big weight. DIAMANDA (9) is a bit of a cult figure on the picnic circuit, but won in this grade last start after giving a sight in BM66 grade, so no reason she doesn't go well again. RUNWAY RULER (7) improved last time out, finishing 2.25 lengths second at Ballarat. Draws to run another nice race. RYANMAN (5) was out of the money two runs back then again missed the frame last start over 1400m at Cranbourne, beaten 5 lengths into seventh, but will find this much easier and draws beautifully.
